Careers
Attention: Beware of Scams!

We are aware of fraudulent activity in which individuals not associated with OPKO Health, Inc pose as company representatives in order to obtain personal data from prospective candidates. OPKO Health, Inc will never ask for payment or send unsolicited job offers. All legitimate company communications from OPKO Health, Inc will come from email addresses ending @bioreference.com, @opko.com, or @modextx.com. Be aware of poorly written emails and/or similar domains that do not exactly match these. If you suspect you are being targeted in such a scam, you may contact talentacquisition@bioreference.com to verify legitimacy.

OPKO Careers

At OPKO Health, we are responsible for improving patient care worldwide. A career with us means you have an international network at your fingertips, with cutting-edge technology and world-renowned clinicians and researchers by your side.

If you're ready for an exciting and fulfilling future with our company and consider yourself a co
